Comment: I am disappointed by the international community... If a war breaks out, anything can happen.
The joint statement is unwarranted, one-sided, and misleading. It has political overtones.
The G20 has been a huge success... India is the right country at the right time.
Germany, Japan, Brazil & India should be permanent members of the UNSC.
As an ironclad friend... China fully understands Pakistan's legitimate security concerns.
New Delhi is free to choose its own trading partners... Trump's threats are efforts to compel nations to sever ties.
Had a very good conversation with my friend President Modi... agreed to strengthen strategic partnership.
